variants.title: Donaldson P114411 Adapter
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P114411 Adapter is designed to provide reliable performance in adapter applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Adapter, Outer Diameter: 43.4 mm, Length: 63.5 mm
